caption: The video features a man sitting in what appears to be a podcast studio, engaging in a conversation or recording a podcast episode for "Boss Talk 101." He is wearing a black cap, headphones, and a black t-shirt with the text "CHECK IT!" visible on it. The man is seated in front of a microphone, suggesting he is speaking into it. The background includes a banner with stars and the words "UNIQUE HUSTLE," as well as a sign that reads "BOSS TALK 101." The setting is professional, with a focus on the man's dialogue, indicating an informative or motivational discussion.
